'''NL-1''' was an [[XQ1 Platform|XQ1]] [[XQ Platform series|Platform]] constructed by [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]].

==History==
[[XQ1 Platform]] ''NL-1'' was constructed by then [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] to help bring order to the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]]. The construction project was overseen by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Maloc]].

Before the base was constructed, Thrawn had discovered that the area was abandoned due to possible Rebel attacks. After collecting important cargo, Thrawn drove off a Rebel attack consisting of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Dragon (CR90 corvette)|''Dragon'']]. Later, an outpost of the [[Pakuuni Pirates]] was discovered. The outpost consisted of several different kinds of containers and three CR90 corvettes, ''[[Leach]]'', ''[[Clavier]]'' and ''[[Grapler]]''. The outpost had to be destroyed so that ''NL-1'' could be built in its place.

Shortly after construction, ''NL-1'' came under attack three times by [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces, but their attempts were thwarted by the efforts of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] and his wingmates.

The first attack from the Rebels consisted of the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Modified Corvette]] groups ''[[Moori]]'' and ''[[Runeer]]'', [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]], [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] and three [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]]. This attack was repelled with heavy losses to the Rebels, including the capture of a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] carrying officers.

[[File:NL-1_complete.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The [[Stalwart (Victory-class)|''Stalwart'']] over NL-1.]]

Another attack took place during Vice Admiral Thrawn's personal inspection of the Station. It was at this time that Thrawn first took notice of Maarek Stele, when Stele's [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] acted as escort for Thrawn's transports to and from the VSD [[Stalwart (Victory-class)|''Stalwart'']]. Stele impressed Thrawn by using the bomber defensively to beat back A-wings, X-Wings, Y-wings and three waves of Lambda-class shuttles, despite the fact that TIE Bombers were not designed for defense.

After final completion and receiving the [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV-1 Patrol Craft]] group [[Ranger (IPV-1 System Patrol Craft)|''Ranger'']], the Rebels had made one final, desperate attack consisting of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]], A-wings, X-wings, 4 [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|Assault Transports]] and 3 Stormtrooper Transports. This attack was also thwarted by Maarek Stele.

==Behind the scenes==
NL-1 during its construction is portrayed as an [[XQ3 Platform]], but upon completion is portrayed as an [[XQ1 Platform]].
